message:
feat: Add memory monitoring for adaptive context budget

- Implement MemoryMonitor with configurable pressure thresholds
- Add platform-specific memory queries for macOS and Linux
- Support memory pressure detection (low/medium/high/critical)
- Implement cached statistics with configurable poll interval
- Add canGrowContext() and shouldShrinkContext() helpers
- Include comprehensive memory stats formatting

Part of Phase 2: Adaptive Context Budget implementation
